docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
FAMILY LAW ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-1998 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404
CONTINUED, CALENDAR MOTION: OTHER HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1998 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404
MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA WITH A SUPPORT PERSON, GREG MERRILL OF CUAV. RESPONDENT DID NOT APPEAR. THE MOVING PARTY'S REQUESTS TO DROP THE RESTRAININ
G ORDER WITHOUT PREJUDICE WAS GRANTED. THE PARTIES WILL CONTINUE IN MEDIATION THROUGH COMMUNITY BOARDS. THE RESTRAINING IS DISSOLVED. THE COURT
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY ANTHONY VAUGHN CSR#6185
RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER PROPERTY ISSUES. CONTINUE TO MARCH 24, 1998, AT 9:30 A.M. FOR A REVIEW OF PROPERTY ISSUES. (KING)DISSOLVED. THE COURT
CONTINUED LONG CAUSE HEARING, CALENDAR MOTION: HEARING HEARING SET FOR APR-10-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 404
MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RESPONDENT DID NOT APPEAR. GREG MERRILL FROM COMMUNITY UNITED AGAINST VIOLENCE WAS PRESENT WITH MR. PARKER. BY TELEPHON
E MR. DUNAWAY INDICATED HE WAS NOT AWARE THAT THERE WAS A HEARING TODAY AND THAT HE IS TOO ILL TO ATTEND TODAY. CONTINUE APRIL 10, 1998, AT 2:00 P.M.
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR# 7006
MR. PARKER SHALL NOTICE MR. DUNAWAY OF THE HEARING. (KING)EARING TODAY AND THAT HE IS TOO ILL TO ATTEND TODAY. CONTINUE APRIL 10, 1998, AT 2:00 P.M.
MINUTES
(404)NO APPEARANCES. DUE TO ILLNESS OF ONE OF THE PARTIES THIS MATTER WILL BE CONTINUED. (KING)
ADDED TO CALENDAR, CALENDAR MOTION: HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAY-12-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 404
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER KING MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM BY PETITIONER IN PRO PER & RESPONDENT IN PRO PER
MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RESPONDENT SHALL NOT CONTACT, HARASS, MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE, THREATEN, SEXUALLY
ASSAULT, BATTER, TELEPHONE, SEND ANY MESSAGES TO, FOLLOW, STALK, DESTROY THE PERSONAL PROPERTY OF, OR OTHERWISE DISTURB THE PEACE OF PETITIONER.
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR# 7006
AFTER JUNE 1, 1998, RESPONDENT SHALL STAY TEN FEET FROM PETITIONER IN PUBLIC PLACES AND SHALL 100 YARDS AWAY FROM PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE. (KING)
